name: WiFi-TTA-Bench
description: Harm-aware benchmark for test-time adaptation (TTA) on WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) under physics-structured domain shift. The benchmark evaluates up to 12 TTA methods (including TENT, SHOT/IM, T3A, SAR, CoTTA, LAME, and physics-informed variants) on three real WiFi CSI datasets and controlled synthetic data. It does not redistribute raw CSI; it provides split manifests, evaluation protocol artifacts, and canonical per-method JSON summaries.
license: CC-BY-4.0 (benchmark artifacts and code; raw datasets retain original academic licences)
rai:dataCollection: Benchmark re-uses existing academic-licensed WiFi CSI datasets (Widar_BVP, NTU-Fi HAR, SignFi-10). No new human-subject data collected by the benchmark authors.
rai:dataCollectionRawData: Raw CSI recordings were collected by the original dataset authors under academic research protocols. WiFi-TTA-Bench does not redistribute the raw recordings; it releases only split manifests and evaluation artifacts.
rai:dataImputationProtocol: None. Missing samples are dropped at prepare-time.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Per-dataset preparation scripts in pinn4csi/data and scripts/prepare_*. Documented shapes: Widar_BVP (22,400), NTU-Fi (114,500), SignFi-10 (200,90). Cross-environment splits are leave-one-environment-out with 3 folds x 5 seeds = 15 paired observations per (dataset, method) cell.
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: Labels inherited unchanged from upstream datasets.
rai:dataAnnotationAnalysis: Label integrity verified by cardinality checks in automated tests (tests/ directory).
rai:dataUseCases: Evaluation of test-time adaptation methods under physics-structured domain shift.
Development of harm-aware adaptation protocols (negative-adaptation rate, source drop).
rai:dataBiases: WiFi CSI datasets were collected in academic laboratory settings with volunteer subjects; demographic and device-diversity coverage is limited. Two of three datasets (NTU-Fi, SignFi-10) use temporal splits within a single laboratory rather than verified physical-room changes; only Widar_BVP is a verified cross-room split.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: None. No personally identifiable information. Original dataset authors collected CSI under informed consent with non-identifying activity labels. WiFi CSI can in principle enable covert monitoring; we redistribute only evaluation artifacts, not raw captures, under an acceptable-use notice.
rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan: Benchmark artifacts maintained on HuggingFace (WiFi-TTA-Bench org) and GitHub (suanlab/WiFi-TTA-Bench). Versioned releases via Zenodo DOI on acceptance. Croissant metadata regenerated on each release.
rai:dataSocialImpact: Research-only benchmark. Improved WiFi-based adaptation could in principle reduce deployment cost but also lower barriers to covert monitoring; we therefore couple method releases with negative-adaptation and source-drop reporting so deployers can detect silently-degrading behaviour.

distribution.name: widar-full-tta-summary
distribution.description: Per-method mean gain + 95% bootstrap CI + Cohen's d + negative adaptation rate for Widar_BVP (primary MLP backbone, n=15 paired observations).

distribution.name: ntufi-tta-summary
distribution.description: Per-method summary for NTU-Fi HAR (primary MLP, n=15).

distribution.name: signfi-tta-summary
distribution.description: Per-method summary for SignFi-10 (primary MLP, n=15).

distribution.name: widar-lame-sar-cotta
distribution.description: SAR, CoTTA, LAME on Widar_BVP (primary MLP, n=15).

distribution.name: ntufi-lame-sar-cotta
distribution.description: SAR, CoTTA, LAME on NTU-Fi HAR (primary MLP, n=15).

distribution.name: signfi-lame-sar-cotta
distribution.description: SAR, CoTTA, LAME on SignFi-10 (primary MLP, n=15).

distribution.name: widar-mlpbn-faithful-sar-cotta
distribution.description: Faithful BN-only SAR/CoTTA + full TENT on MLP+BN Widar_BVP backbone (n=15).

distribution.name: arch-ablation-with-ci
distribution.description: Three-backbone architecture ablation with 95% bootstrap CIs (MLP, MLP+BN, CNN1D+BN).

distribution.name: faithful-tent
distribution.description: Faithful BN-only TENT on MLP+BN Widar_BVP (n=15).

distribution.name: source-overfit
distribution.description: Source-overfit mitigation pilot: label smoothing alpha in {0.0, 0.1, 0.2} on Widar (n=15).

distribution.name: widar-per-class
distribution.description: Per-class Widar target accuracy and mean max-softmax confidence (source-only, aggregated over n=15 runs).

distribution.name: split-widar-bvp
distribution.description: Widar_BVP split manifest: leave-one-room-out folds and shape metadata. No raw CSI is redistributed.

distribution.name: split-ntufi-har
distribution.description: NTU-Fi HAR split manifest. No raw CSI is redistributed.

distribution.name: split-signfi-top10
distribution.description: SignFi-10 split manifest. No raw CSI is redistributed.

distribution.name: submission-manifest
distribution.description: Mapping from paper tables/figures to backing artifacts.
